svg.text: Using circle perimeter for progressive drawing Script // we get radius of circle node = evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById('circle') r = parseFloat(node.getAttributeNS(null , "rx")) // Calcul of perimeter perimeter = 2 * Math.PI * r // Affect this value for stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset node.setAttributeNS(null , 'stroke-dasharray' , perimeter.toString() + " " + perimeter.toString() ) node.setAttributeNS(null , 'stroke-dashoffset' , perimeter.toString() ) // Affect this value for from in animate element evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById('anime1').setAttributeNS(null , 'from' , perimeter.toString() ) SVG objects < circle id="circle" cx="350" cy="450" r="100" stroke="blue" fill="lime" fill-opacity="0" > < animate id="anime1" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" to="0" dur="5s" begin="go.click" fill="freeze"/> </circle>
